- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. Created the file with initial checklist.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Already provided in user query.

- [x] Scaffold the Project - Ran npx create-vite@latest . --template react-ts --overwrite and installing dependencies.

- [x] Customize the Project - Implemented the todo list app with form, task list, and responsive CSS.

- [x] Install Required Extensions - No extensions needed.

- [x] Compile the Project - Dependencies installed successfully.

- [x] Create and Run Task - Dev server started on port 5173.

- [x] Launch the Project - App is running at http://localhost:5173/

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - Updated README.md and cleaned copilot-instructions.md.

- [x] Add Touch Gesture Support - Implemented swipe-to-delete and tap-to-complete with native TouchEvents, ensuring undoable actions and no conflicts with interactive elements or scrolling.

- [x] Full State Attribute and Accessibility Audit - Fixed aria-checked and aria-pressed to use string values ("true"/"false") instead of booleans for proper accessibility compliance. Confirmed all data attributes, aria attributes, data-testid, and responsive features are correct.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
